data.content: Planning complete. 7 child knots created covering: (1) schema/data model migration, (2) event kind + rehydration/sync handlers, (3) CLI flags, (4) KnotView + prompt rendering, (5) foolery knots.ts serialization, (6) foolery knots-backend shim→native migration, (7) tests across both repos. Key design decisions: acceptance follows the description_set pattern exactly; create emits a separate knot.acceptance_set event (not embedded in knot.created); foolery keeps note-extraction as deprecated fallback for backward compat. Execution order: children 1→2→3→4 (knots core, sequential deps), then 5→6 (foolery, sequential deps), then 7 (tests, after all code lands).
